[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000100000 1
2 000000011 2
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a

01 000000000 a match 0 3 4 5 6 7
12 000100110 3
23 101010001 4
34 000000000 a match 0 3 4 5 6 7
45 010110011 5
56 000001000 1
67 001100000 2
70 100000110 3

02 000100000 1 match 1
13 001000111 4
24 101000000 2
35 010100000 2
46 010011011 5
57 000001000 1
60 101000100 3
71 100000000 1

47 010111000 4
50 000001100 2
61 100000000 1
72 000000110 2
